---
title: "404: Page Not Found"
description: This page does not exist.
toc: false
---

The page you are looking for is not here.

Try one of these instead:

- [Home](index.qmd): what Yamark is.
- [Showcase](examples.qmd): before and after examples.
- [Usage](usage.qmd): install and run.
- [Editors](editors.qmd): VS Code, Positron, settings, and logs.
- [Git Filter](git-filter.qmd): clean/smudge adoption for Markdown.
- [Reference](reference.qmd): supported syntax, options, directives, and
  safety.
- [CLI Help](cli-help.qmd): rendered top-level CLI help.
- [Benchmarks](benchmarks.qmd): performance against other formatters.
- [Project on GitHub](https://github.com/t-kalinowski/yamark): source,
  issues, and releases.
